name: Tooltip
description: A tooltip component for displaying helpful information on hover or focus with customizable placement.
usage_guidelines: Use for providing additional context or help text.
Keep tooltip content brief and informative.
Choose appropriate placement to avoid overflow.
Use for icon buttons or truncated text.
Ensure tooltips don't block important content.

styling_info.method: Tailwind CSS with Floating UI and Framer Motion
styling_info.visual_description: A small dark box with white text that appears near the trigger element. Includes smooth fade animation. Automatically repositions to stay in viewport.

Dont: Don't put interactive content in tooltips
Don't use for long text (use Popover instead)

Basic.title: Basic

Customize.title: Customize

DefaultOpen.title: Default Open

import Tooltip from '@/components/ui/Tooltip' const Placement = () => { return (
